subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Bear thou witness that there is none other God but Him. His is the sovereignty and creation; He doeth what He willeth and ordaineth what He pleaseth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مهدی فاشهد بانه لا اله الا هو له الامر و الخلق یفعل ما یشاء و یحکم ما
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
